channel.title: [Online Talk at #WCEU] - Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges
channel.description:
We're very excited to share that our co-founder and lead developer @luisherranz is speaking at the first online WordCamp Europe this Friday! 🙂
In his talk "**Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges**", Luis will walk through all of the available frameworks and explain what can be achieved with each of them.
He will also introduce the upcoming "[Embedded Mode](https://twitter.com/frontity/status/1266081587835387905?s=20)" WordPress plugin we are currently working on, among many other things!
![wceu-speaker-friday-track2-01|690x388](upload://c5DGzXLBqUbFopFkgkiXZPtuZZx.jpeg)
👨‍💻 "Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges" 🗓 Friday, 5 June 🕑 15:15 CEST 📍 Track 2
You can register for free here:
https://2020.europe.wordcamp.org/tickets/

item.title: [Online Talk at #WCEU] - Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We’re very excited to share that our co-founder and lead developer @luisherranz is speaking at the first online WordCamp Europe this Friday!

In his talk “Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges”, Luis will walk through all of the available frameworks and explain what can be achieved with each of them.

He will also introduce the upcoming “Embedded Mode” WordPress plugin we are currently working on, among many other things!

“Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges”
Friday, 5 June
15:15 CEST
Track 2

You can register for free here:

WordCamp Europe 2020 Online – 18 Nov 19

Tickets

Tickets for WordCamp Europe 2020 Online are now available! The event will take place over 4-6 June, with a virtual Contributor Day on 4 June followed by two half days on 5 and 6 June of talks, netw…

Read full topic
item.source: [Online Talk at #WCEU] - Headless WordPress: current status and remaining challenges
